title: ocotea limiticola
intro: Ocotea limiticola, also known as Peruvian Gold, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Peru. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea limiticola include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and stress relief. Ocotea limiticola is typically prepared as an essential oil or a tincture, which can be used in aromatherapy, massage, or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
